title: Fire exit maps; hotel or motel rooms
doc_html:
§1580.  Fire exit maps; hotel or motel rooms

Every hotel or motel room shall have posted on the back of the main entry door to the room a map indicating where the exits are located in case of fire or other emergency.

Added by Acts 1981, No. 593, §1.
